# 😮  Extended: Cyber Monday Sale

## Body
Cyber Monday Extended: Save 70% on MonsterInsights! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XkFphT7csMQuMLXh0p7ZnjdQzCldJL9LA82C7sY5g-A )

Hey Muhammad,

Due to the overwhelming success of our Cyber Monday sale, we've
decided to extend our sale!

If you’ve been dragging your feet, don’t wait any longer or
you’ll miss it!

Save 70% Now 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..XkFphT7csMQuMLXh0p7ZnjdQzCldJL9LA82C7sY5g-A )

When you purchase MonsterInsights Pro this Cyber Monday, we’re
also giving you a whole year of UserFeedback Plus for free! Find
out the why behind your visitors' actions with simple yet
powerful user surveys.

Until next time,
Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator

*Discount applies to new purchases and upgrades only.

Don't want to receive emails about Black Friday? Click here
